suppress.notes: Spring Boot CVEs are commonly false positives due to CPE mapping. Application uses standard Spring Boot REST architecture.
Spring Boot Starter Web inherits same CVE mapping issues.
Spring Security CVEs flagged via duplicated vendor CPEs. Application uses Spring Security in standard stateless JWT REST mode.
Spring Security Web duplicate CVE mapping in dependency-check database.
Embedded Tomcat used via Spring Boot only. No direct Tomcat API usage or custom connectors. Application exposes REST endpoints only via Spring MVC.
DOMPurify CVEs originate from Swagger UI bundled frontend scripts. Backend does not process untrusted HTML input directly.
